title: Personal Health Care Advocate Services * Transgender Individuals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Personal Health Care Advocate Services * Transgender Individuals 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OHSU OHSU PARTNERSHIP PROJECT TRANSGENDER HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical services for people seeking gender transition-related care. Services include education and preparation for transgender medical services, clinician referrals, and specialized information and referral for transgender issues. Medical services provided include hormone therapy, fertility services, laser hair removal, and surgeries for face, chest, and sexual organs. Also offers education, training, and advocacy for transgender health issues within the OHSU community. 2525 SW 1st Avenue Suite 1201 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Age 18 and older seeking gender transition-related care Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 494-7970 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU TRANSGENDER HEALTH PROGRAM
